# @enterprise/env

Strongly typed environment configuration with Zod validation and fail-fast strategy.

| Entry                    | Purpose                    |
| ------------------------ | -------------------------- |
| `@enterprise/env`        | Core `createEnv()` factory |
| `@enterprise/env/client` | Browser-safe env parsing   |
| `@enterprise/env/server` | Server-only env parsing    |

**Depends on:** `@enterprise/types`, `@enterprise/validation`, `@enterprise/errors`
